title: Generative Adversarial Networks
abstract: We propose a new framework for estimating generative models via an adversarial process in which two models are simultaneously trained.
text: Generative Adversarial Networks We propose a new framework for estimating generative models via an adversarial process in which two models are simultaneously trained.

title: A Simple Baseline for Semi-Supervised Learning
abstract: We revisit semi-supervised learning and propose a simple baseline that achieves strong performance on standard benchmarks.
text: A Simple Baseline for Semi-Supervised Learning We revisit semi-supervised learning and propose a simple baseline that achieves strong performance on standard benchmarks.

title: Dropout: A Simple Way to Prevent Neural Networks from Overfitting
abstract: We describe dropout a technique for addressing overfitting in neural networks by randomly dropping units during training.
text: Dropout: A Simple Way to Prevent Neural Networks from Overfitting We describe dropout a technique for addressing overfitting in neural networks by randomly dropping units during training.

title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: We propose a new simple network architecture the Transformer based solely on attention mechanisms dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.
text: Attention Is All You Need We propose a new simple network architecture the Transformer based solely on attention mechanisms dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.

title: Variational Autoencoders for Collaborative Filtering
abstract: We apply variational autoencoders to collaborative filtering for implicit feedback datasets and achieve state-of-the-art results.
text: Variational Autoencoders for Collaborative Filtering We apply variational autoencoders to collaborative filtering for implicit feedback datasets and achieve state-of-the-art results.

title: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
abstract: We introduce Adam an algorithm for first-order gradient-based optimization of stochastic objective functions.
text: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization We introduce Adam an algorithm for first-order gradient-based optimization of stochastic objective functions.

title: Predicting Hospital Readmission Using EHR Data
abstract: We build a machine learning pipeline to predict 30-day hospital readmission using electronic health records.
text: Predicting Hospital Readmission Using EHR Data We build a machine learning pipeline to predict 30-day hospital readmission using electronic health records.

title: On the Limitations of Current Neural Networks
abstract: This paper discusses several fundamental limitations of current deep learning approaches and suggests future research directions.
text: On the Limitations of Current Neural Networks This paper discusses several fundamental limitations of current deep learning approaches and suggests future research directions.

title: Neural Machine Translation by Jointly Learning to Align and Translate
abstract: We propose an extension to the encoder-decoder model which learns to align and translate jointly improving translation quality.
text: Neural Machine Translation by Jointly Learning to Align and Translate We propose an extension to the encoder-decoder model which learns to align and translate jointly improving translation quality.

title: Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: We present the first deep learning model to successfully learn control policies directly from high-dimensional sensory input using reinforcement learning.
text: Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning We present the first deep learning model to successfully learn control policies directly from high-dimensional sensory input using reinforcement learning.

title: Towards Robust Text Classification Under Distribution Shift
abstract: We study the robustness of text classifiers under distribution shift and propose a simple data augmentation strategy.
text: Towards Robust Text Classification Under Distribution Shift We study the robustness of text classifiers under distribution shift and propose a simple data augmentation strategy.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
abstract: We introduce BERT a new language representation model which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.
text: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers We introduce BERT a new language representation model which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.

title: A Survey of Transformer Models in NLP
abstract: We survey recent transformer-based models in natural language processing and summarize their architectures and benchmarks.
text: A Survey of Transformer Models in NLP We survey recent transformer-based models in natural language processing and summarize their architectures and benchmarks.

title: Predicting Stock Prices Using LSTM
abstract: We apply long short-term memory networks to predict stock market prices using historical data from NYSE.
text: Predicting Stock Prices Using LSTM We apply long short-term memory networks to predict stock market prices using historical data from NYSE.
